title: Read any document
description: A project owner or AI tool reads any RCF document by id and gets its current content together with a validity report.
iWant: to read any RCF document by its id
soThat: I can inspect a document's current content without opening files by hand

acceptanceCriteria.description: Reading a valid document returns it and reports it as valid
acceptanceCriteria.then: the document is returned and reported as valid against its schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: Reading an id with no file returns a structured not-found error naming the id
acceptanceCriteria.then: a structured not-found error is returned naming the id

acceptanceCriteria.description: Reading an invalid document returns both the content and the validation errors
acceptanceCriteria.given: a document that exists but fails validation
acceptanceCriteria.then: the document is returned together with the validation errors, so the caller sees both content and the problem
